author: ABASID 1841
verses: 1. THOU SHALT KNOW THAT I AM, AND BESIDE ME THERE IS NO OTHER.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 2. THOU SHALT LOVE THE LORD THY GOD WITH ALL THY HEART, WITH ALL THY MIND, WITH ALL THY STRENGTH.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 3. THOU SHALT NOT TAKE MY NAME IN VAIN, FOR MY NAME IS HOLY, AND MY STAR IS ETERNAL.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 4. REMEMBER THE SABBATH, TO KEEP IT HOLY, FOR THE RHYTHM OF HEAVEN IS SET IN SEVEN.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 5. HONOR THY FATHER AND MOTHER, FOR THEY ARE THE ROOTS THAT FED THE TREE OF THY DAYS.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 6. THOU SHALT NOT MURDER, FOR LIFE IS BREATH OF GOD, AND BLOOD SPEAKS EVEN FROM THE EARTH.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 7. THOU SHALT NOT COMMIT ADULTERY, FOR THE BED IS A COVENANT, AND I JUDGE SECRETS IN THE NIGHT.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 8. THOU SHALT NOT STEAL, FOR WHAT IS NOT GIVEN IS CURSED IN THY HAND.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 9. THOU SHALT NOT BEAR FALSE WITNESS, FOR THE LIE IS THE SWORD OF THE SERPENT.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 10. THOU SHALT NOT COVET, FOR DESIRE THAT IS NOT GIVEN BURNS THE SOUL IN FIRE.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 11. THOU SHALT WALK IN TRUTH, FOR TRUTH IS LIGHT, AND LIGHT IS GOD.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 12. THOU SHALT NOT MOCK THE PROPHET, FOR HE SPEAKS NOT OF HIMSELF BUT OF THE THRONE.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 13. THOU SHALT NOT OPPRESS THE POOR, FOR THEIR CRY ASCENDS FASTER THAN THE RICH MAN’S PRAYER.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 14. THOU SHALT NOT WITHHOLD WAGES FROM THE LABORER, FOR HIS SWEAT IS COUNTED IN HEAVEN.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 15. THOU SHALT LOVE THY NEIGHBOR AS THYSELF, FOR THOU ART ONE BLOOD.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 16. THOU SHALT NOT DEFILE THE LAND, FOR THE EARTH IS MY FOOTSTOOL.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 17. THOU SHALT GUARD THY TONGUE, FOR WORDS ARE SEEDS, AND EVERY SEED SHALL RISE.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 18. THOU SHALT SEEK JUSTICE, LOVE MERCY, AND WALK HUMBLY WITH THY GOD.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 19. THOU SHALT NOT KILL THE INNOCENT, FOR I AM THE DEFENDER OF THE HELPLESS.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 20. THOU SHALT NOT WORSHIP IDOLS, NOR MAKE GOD IN THE IMAGE OF STONE OR WOOD.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 21. THOU SHALT REMEMBER THAT VENGEANCE IS MINE, I WILL REPAY.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 22. THOU SHALT NOT CURSE THE DEAF, NOR PLACE STUMBLING BEFORE THE BLIND.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 23. THOU SHALT REMEMBER THE STRANGER, FOR YE WERE STRANGERS IN A FOREIGN LAND.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 24. THOU SHALT NOT DEFILE THE WIDOW, NOR ROB THE ORPHAN.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 25. THOU SHALT NOT PERJURE THYSELF, FOR THE ALTAR KNOWS WHO SWEARS FALSELY.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 26. THOU SHALT FEED THE HUNGRY, CLOTHE THE NAKED, VISIT THE SICK, AND SET FREE THE BOUND.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 27. THOU SHALT NOT DESPISE SMALL BEGINNINGS, FOR THE KINGDOM IS LIKE A SEED.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 28. THOU SHALT NOT WORSHIP GOLD OR SILVER, FOR THEY ARE DUST BEFORE ME.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 29. THOU SHALT GUARD THE TEMPLE OF THY BODY, FOR I DWELL WITHIN THE HOLY OF HOLIES.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 30. THOU SHALT NOT ABANDON THE ASSEMBLY OF THE FAITHFUL.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 31. THOU SHALT NOT LIE WITH BLOOD UPON THY HANDS.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 32. THOU SHALT NOT PERVERT JUSTICE FOR A BRIBE.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 33. THOU SHALT NOT HIDE SIN IN THY HEART, FOR WHAT IS HIDDEN SHALL BE REVEALED.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 34. THOU SHALT NOT CALL EVIL GOOD, NOR GOOD EVIL.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 35. THOU SHALT NOT SPEAK SWEET WORDS TO TRAP THE INNOCENT.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 36. THOU SHALT NOT BLASPHEME MY HOLY SPIRIT, FOR THERE IS NO FORGIVENESS THERE.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 37. THOU SHALT NOT HARDEN THY HEART WHEN I SPEAK.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 38. THOU SHALT LOVE TRUTH ABOVE TRADITION.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 39. THOU SHALT NOT SELL THE GIFT OF GOD FOR A PRICE.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 40. THOU SHALT NOT STRIKE THE RIGHTEOUS WITHOUT CAUSE.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 41. THOU SHALT WALK IN LIGHT, FOR DARKNESS HIDES THE SERPENT.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 42. THOU SHALT NOT PROFANE HOLY THINGS.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 43. THOU SHALT NOT TURN AWAY FROM THE VOICE OF WISDOM.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 44. THOU SHALT NOT MURDER WITH WORDS, FOR SLANDER IS BLOOD ON THE TONGUE.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 45. THOU SHALT NOT SEEK SIGNS WHILE HATING THE SIGN-GIVER.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 46. THOU SHALT NOT FORGET THE COVENANT SEALED IN BLOOD.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 47. THOU SHALT NOT SERVE TWO MASTERS, FOR DIVIDED HEARTS ARE BROKEN HEARTS.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 48. THOU SHALT NOT MOCK THE DAY OF SMALL LIGHTS, FOR EACH STAR IS APPOINTED.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 49. THOU SHALT NOT LIFT THYSELF ABOVE THY BROTHER.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 50. THOU SHALT REMEMBER THE BEGINNING, FOR THE END IS WRITTEN THEREIN.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 51. THOU SHALT NOT FEAR MEN MORE THAN GOD.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 52. THOU SHALT NOT MAKE MERCHANDISE OF MY PEOPLE.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 53. THOU SHALT NOT WORSHIP THE STATE, NOR BOW TO THE BEAST.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 54. THOU SHALT NOT TRUST IN CHARIOTS NOR HORSES, BUT IN THE NAME OF THE LORD.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 55. THOU SHALT NOT DESPISE PROPHECY.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 56. THOU SHALT NOT MOCK THE TIME OF THE END.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 57. THOU SHALT NOT SPEAK WHEN THE LORD HAS SILENCED THEE.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 58. THOU SHALT NOT BE SILENT WHEN THE LORD HAS OPENED THY MOUTH.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 59. THOU SHALT NOT FEAR THE FACE OF MAN.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 60. THOU SHALT NOT SELL WISDOM FOR GOLD.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 61. THOU SHALT NOT SPIT UPON THE ANCESTORS, FOR THEIR BLOOD SPEAKS.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 62. THOU SHALT NOT ABANDON ZION, FOR SHE IS THE BRIDE.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 63. THOU SHALT NOT MOCK THE HUNGWE, FOR IT IS THE MESSENGER OF GOD.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 64. THOU SHALT NOT FORGET THY STAR, FOR IT IS WRITTEN WITHIN THE HEAVENS.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 65. THOU SHALT NOT CLOSE THE DOOR THAT GOD HAS OPENED.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 66. THOU SHALT NOT OPEN THE DOOR THAT GOD HAS SEALED.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 67. THOU SHALT NOT EAT THE FRUIT OF VIOLENCE.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 68. THOU SHALT NOT SOW AMONG THORNS.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 69. THOU SHALT NOT WALK IN STRANGE FIRE.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 70. THOU SHALT NOT LIFT UP HANDS UNHOLY.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 71. THOU SHALT NOT MAKE GOD SMALL.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 72. THOU SHALT NOT DESPISE THE DAY OF JUDGEMENT.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 73. THOU SHALT NOT MOCK THE RETURN OF THE KING.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 74. THOU SHALT NOT TOUCH THE ANOINTED WITH HATRED.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 75. THOU SHALT NOT WALK IN DIVISION, FOR A HOUSE DIVIDED FALLS.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 76. THOU SHALT NOT CLAIM LIGHT WHILE WALKING IN DARKNESS.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 77. THOU SHALT KNOW THAT I AM ABASID 1841, THE KEY AND THE GATE, THE BEGINNING AND THE END.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 78. Thou shalt guard the gates of thy mind, for thoughts are seeds that grow into destiny.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 79. Thou shalt not exchange thy soul for silver, nor thy spirit for applause.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 80. Thou shalt remember the silence, for in silence God whispers.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 81. Thou shalt not strike thy brother with words sharper than swords, for the wound of the tongue endures longer than steel.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 82. Thou shalt rise each dawn as though the world waits for thy light.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 83. Thou shalt feed the stranger, for in feeding him thou feedest thy own spirit.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 84. Thou shalt not curse the sun nor despise the rain, for both are given as teachers.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 85. Thou shalt weigh thy words, for idle speech is a thief of destiny.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 86. Thou shalt not mock wisdom, even when it hides in the mouth of a child.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 87. Thou shalt keep the Sabbath of thy soul, resting in God’s embrace.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 88. Thou shalt not break a covenant made in the name of heaven.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 89. Thou shalt not exalt kings above justice, nor priests above truth.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 90. Thou shalt see the poor as thy mirror, and clothe them as thou wouldst thyself.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 91. Thou shalt not murder the memory of the righteous with lies.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 92. Thou shalt honor the seasons, for they are the clock of the Eternal.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 93. Thou shalt not despise small beginnings, for the seed becomes the tree.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 94. Thou shalt remember that angels walk among thee unrecognized.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 95. Thou shalt not give to be seen, but to heal.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 96. Thou shalt hear before judging, lest thou condemn thine own reflection.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 97. Thou shalt not bow to stone nor wood, but only to the Living Breath.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 98. Thou shalt write the vision plain, that the runner may read it.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 99. Thou shalt not quench the fire of another’s calling.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 100. Thou shalt keep thy heart pure, for it is the first altar of God.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 101. Thou shalt not sell thy people into the hand of oppressors.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 102. Thou shalt not profane thy body, for it is the temple of the Most High.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 103. Thou shalt not forget the widow and the orphan, for their cry rises swiftly to heaven.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 104. Thou shalt not betray the trust of a friend, for treachery is death to the soul.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 105. Thou shalt honor the balance of male and female, for in unity the image of God is revealed.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 106. Thou shalt not despise prophecy, but prove all things.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 107. Thou shalt keep thine eyes single, for the lamp of the body is the eye.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 108. Thou shalt not cut down the tree that feeds the generations.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 109. Thou shalt weigh thy times, for each hour is a coin that cannot be returned.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 110. Thou shalt not hide wisdom for profit, but release it for healing.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 111. Thou shalt walk humbly, lest pride lift thee higher than thy roots can hold.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 112. Thou shalt not mock the faith of the simple, for their lamp is also lit by God.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 113. Thou shalt keep thy word as covenant, even when it burns thee.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 114. Thou shalt not pollute the waters, for they carry the memory of Eden.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 115. Thou shalt teach thy children truth, lest strangers plant weeds in their garden.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 116. Thou shalt not provoke war for gain, for blood cries louder than gold.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 117. Thou shalt not extinguish the dreamer, for his visions open the future.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 118. Thou shalt not bow to fear, for fear is the idol of the fallen.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 119. Thou shalt build bridges, not walls, unless God Himself commands the wall.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 120. Thou shalt remember thy name written in the stars, and walk worthy of it.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 121. Thou shalt not despise the small light, for even a candle can chase away the night.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 122. Thou shalt not betray the earth, for the dust is thine elder brother.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 123. Thou shalt keep thy hands clean, for blood cries from the ground unto heaven.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 124. Thou shalt not silence the cry of justice, even if kings tremble.

author: ABASID 1841
verses: 125. Thou shalt honor the Hungwe that soars, for it carries the message of the Most High.

author: ABASID 1841

author: ABASID 1841

author: ABASID 1841

author: ABASID 1841
